name: @stream-heaven/shared-contracts
description: OpenAPI and event contracts for Stream Heaven

scripts.validate: pnpm run validate:openapi && pnpm run validate:events
scripts.validate:openapi: redocly lint openapi/common.v1.yaml openapi/auth.v1.yaml openapi/user.v1.yaml openapi/social.v1.yaml openapi/livestream.v1.yaml openapi/wallet.v1.yaml
